rows.recoveryStrategy: crash-safe persistent recovery plan written before apply; independent watchdog restores backup if app or compositor fails to confirm

rows.nextRequiredWork: crash-safe watchdog must survive app/compositor failure before debug/crash rows can be enabled
rows.notes: Design and dry-run proof only; row remains blocked until independent production watchdog is implemented and approved.

rows.nextRequiredWork: crash-safe watchdog must survive app/compositor failure before debug/crash rows can be enabled
rows.notes: Design and dry-run proof only; row remains blocked until independent production watchdog is implemented and approved.

rows.recoveryStrategy: independent-file-restore-watchdog-plus-out-of-band-confirmation; must not depend on visible UI or working compositor output
rows.highRiskReason: Display/render/session settings may affect compositor output, color management, XWayland, scanout, or render scheduling.
rows.nextRequiredWork: external watchdog process must restore backup on timeout before display/render rows can be enabled
rows.notes: Design and dry-run proof only; row remains blocked until independent production watchdog is implemented and approved.
